dashboard.refer_desc: Share CitizenMate and get 7 days of Premium free!
dashboard.set_date_prompt: Set your test date for a personalised study plan

onboarding.description: Let's get started by setting your goal test date. This helps us tailor your study plan.
onboarding.dont_know_date: I don't know my test date yet

upgrade.title: Unlock Your Full Potential
upgrade.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your study timeline.
upgrade.pro_desc: Perfect for pacing your study over a few months.
upgrade.premium_desc: Everything you need to pass in one go. No subscriptions.

smart_practice.hero_desc: Questions are ordered based on your performance — weakest areas first. Learn smarter, not harder, mate.
smart_practice.focus_desc: Get 15 questions focused on this topic, ordered from weakest to strongest.
smart_practice.all_desc: Get 15 questions across all topics, ordered so you tackle your weakest areas first. Instant feedback — no timer.
smart_practice.daily_limit_reached: Daily limit reached. Upgrade for unlimited practice.
smart_practice.step_1_desc: We remember every question you've answered — right or wrong — across all practice tests and smart sessions.
smart_practice.step_2_desc: Questions you've gotten wrong come back sooner. Mastered ones fade away. Your weakest topics always come first.
smart_practice.step_3_desc: As you master a question, it appears less often — at 1 day, then 3, then a week. Just like how your brain actually learns.

practice.hero_desc: Real Australian citizenship test simulations — exactly like the real thing. Timed, scored, and instantly graded.
practice.smart_desc: AI-driven questions that adapt to your weak areas using spaced repetition.
practice.smart_premium_desc: Your AI-powered study companion. Questions adapt to your weakest areas.
practice.tip_1_desc: Find a quiet spot, set a timer, and treat each mock test like the actual exam.
practice.tip_2_desc: After each test, read the explanations — even for correct answers.
practice.tip_3_desc: Use Smart Practice to target topics where you scored below 80%.
practice.tip_4_desc: One test per day is better than five in one sitting.

results.passed_desc: Brilliant work! You're well on your way. Keep practising to stay sharp for the real test.
results.failed_desc: You've already mastered {mastered} questions. Focus on the topics below and you'll get there.
results.premium_upsell_desc: Unlock CitizenMate Pro for targeted weak-area quizzes and unlimited AI tutoring.
results.rec_values_msg: You scored {values_correct}/5 on Australian Values. All 5 must be correct to pass the real test — this is non-negotiable.
results.rec_close_msg: You need {remaining} more correct answers to pass. Focus on the topics where your accuracy is lowest below.
results.rec_weak_msg: You scored {correct}/{total} ({accuracy}%) in this area. Spend extra time reviewing these questions.
results.rec_ready_msg: Great result! You passed with {total_correct}/{total} ({percentage}%). Keep refreshing your knowledge with another test.

premium.one_time_payment: One-time payment · 60 days access · No subscription
premium.sprint_pass_desc: Everything you need to pass in one payment. No subscriptions, no hidden fees.
premium.upgrade_prompt: Upgrade to Premium to unlock this feature.

referral.title: Help a Mate
referral.description: Share this link. When they sign up, you both get 7 days of Premium!

quiz.question: Question
quiz.marked_incorrect: . Unanswered questions will be marked as incorrect.
quiz.ready_for_results: questions. Ready to see your results?
quiz.no_results_desc: Take a practice test first to see your results here.
quiz.encouragement_fail: "No worries, mate — every practice test makes you stronger. You've got this. 🇦🇺"

study.hero_desc: Browse the official study content in English and Chinese. Track your progress topic by topic, mate.
study.tip_values_desc: all 5 values questions must be correct to pass. Study this topic thoroughly.
study.tip_bilingual_desc: toggle between English and Chinese to understand concepts in both languages.
study.tip_review_desc: each section highlights the most important points you need to remember.
study.tip_progress_desc: mark sections as complete to see your overall readiness.
study.values_warning: All 5 values questions must be answered correctly to pass the citizenship test. Study this topic carefully.
study.topic_complete_desc: You’ve studied every section in this topic. Amazing work!

legal.about_subtitle: We're on a mission to help everyone pass their Australian citizenship test with confidence.
legal.about_mission: Empowering your journey to Australian citizenship.
legal.about_para_1: CitizenMate was born out of a simple observation: preparing for the Australian citizenship test shouldn't be stressful, confusing, or limited by language barriers.
legal.about_para_2: We realised that the official materials, while comprehensive, can be overwhelming. We wanted to create a modern, AI-powered platform that doesn't just throw practice questions at you, but actually helps you understand the “Our Common Bond” material deeply.
legal.about_para_3: Our bilingual study modes, smart mock tests, and personalised study plans are all designed with one goal in mind: to get you ready for your test day as efficiently as possible, so you can celebrate becoming an Australian citizen.
legal.about_contact_desc: Have a question or need support? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you shortly.
legal.about_privacy_note: By submitting this form, you agree to our privacy policy.
legal.terms_acceptance_p1: By accessing or using CitizenMate (“the Service”), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service (“Terms”). If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not use the Service.
legal.terms_acceptance_p2: These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and CitizenMate (“we”, “us”, or “our”).
legal.terms_description_p1: CitizenMate is an online study platform designed to help users prepare for the Australian Citizenship Test. The Service includes:
legal.terms_description_li1: Practice tests based on the official test format
legal.terms_description_li2: Study materials covering topics from the “Our Common Bond” resource booklet
legal.terms_description_li3: AI-powered tutoring via the AI Tutor chatbot
legal.terms_disclaimer_p1_bold: CitizenMate is an independent study tool. It is NOT affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to the Australian Government, the Department of Home Affairs, or any government agency.
legal.terms_disclaimer_p2_prefix: Our practice questions are inspired by the types of questions in the official test but are
legal.terms_disclaimer_p2_suffix: official test questions. The content is based on publicly available materials, primarily the “Our Common Bond” booklet published by the Department of Home Affairs.
legal.terms_disclaimer_p3_bold: Using CitizenMate does not guarantee that you will pass the Australian Citizenship Test.
legal.terms_disclaimer_p3_suffix: Test outcomes depend on many factors, including the specific questions presented in the official examination.
legal.terms_accounts_li1: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
legal.terms_accounts_li2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials.
legal.terms_accounts_li3: You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
legal.terms_accounts_li4: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorised use of your account.
legal.terms_acceptable_use_li1: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
legal.terms_acceptable_use_li2: Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the Service
legal.terms_acceptable_use_li3: Use automated scripts, bots, or scrapers to access the Service
legal.terms_acceptable_use_li4: Abuse the AI Tutor by sending excessive, spam, or harmful requests
legal.terms_acceptable_use_li5: Share your account credentials with others
legal.terms_acceptable_use_li6: Reproduce, distribute, or resell any content from the Service without permission
legal.terms_acceptable_use_li7: Interfere with or disrupt the Service or servers connected to the Service
legal.terms_ip_p1: All content, features, and functionality of the Service — including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, icons, images, software, and the overall design — are owned by CitizenMate and protected by Australian and international intellectual property laws.
legal.terms_ip_p2: Content sourced from the “Our Common Bond” booklet is attributed to the Australian Government Department of Home Affairs and is used for educational purposes under fair dealing provisions.
legal.terms_payments_plans_p1: CitizenMate offers both free and paid tiers. Paid plans (“Exam Sprint Pass”) provide access to premium features for a fixed duration.
legal.terms_payments_billing_li1: All prices are listed in Australian Dollars (AUD) and include GST.
legal.terms_payments_billing_li2: Payment is processed securely through our payment provider.
legal.terms_payments_billing_li3: Subscription plans renew automatically unless cancelled before the renewal date.
legal.terms_payments_refund_li1: You may request a full refund within
legal.terms_payments_refund_li1_suffix: of purchase if you have not completed more than 2 practice tests during that period.
legal.terms_payments_refund_li2: Refund requests can be made by emailing
legal.terms_payments_refund_li3: Refunds are processed within 5–10 business days to your original payment method.
legal.terms_ai_tutor_p1: The AI Tutor is powered by Google Gemini and provides
legal.terms_ai_tutor_li1: AI responses may occasionally contain inaccuracies or outdated information.
legal.terms_ai_tutor_li2: The AI Tutor is not a substitute for reading the official “Our Common Bond” booklet.
legal.terms_ai_tutor_li3: We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any AI-generated content.
legal.terms_ai_tutor_li4: Use of the AI Tutor is subject to rate limits to ensure fair access for all users.
legal.terms_limitation_p1: To the maximum extent permitted by Australian law, CitizenMate shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to:
legal.terms_limitation_li2: Failure to pass the citizenship test
legal.terms_limitation_li4: Errors or inaccuracies in content or AI responses
legal.terms_limitation_p2: Our total liability for any claim arising from or related to the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
legal.terms_termination_p1: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, without prior notice, for conduct that we determine violates these Terms or is harmful to other users or the Service.
legal.terms_termination_p2_prefix: You may delete your account at any time through your account settings. Upon deletion, your personal data will be removed in accordance with our
legal.terms_governing_law_p1_prefix: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the
legal.terms_governing_law_p1_bold: State of New South Wales, Australia
legal.terms_governing_law_p1_suffix: . Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of New South Wales.
legal.terms_changes_p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a prominent notice on the Service. Your continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
legal.terms_contact_p1: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
legal.privacy_overview_p1: CitizenMate (“we”, “us”, or “our”) is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our web application at citizenmate.com.au (the “Service”).
legal.privacy_overview_p2_suffix: (APPs). By using the Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
legal.privacy_info_collect_provided_li1_desc: Email address and display name when you create an account via Supabase authentication.
legal.privacy_info_collect_provided_li2_desc: Your quiz answers, scores, topic mastery data, and study preferences.
legal.privacy_info_collect_provided_li3_desc: Your scheduled citizenship test date, if you choose to set one.
legal.privacy_info_collect_provided_li4_desc: Messages you send to the AI Tutor chatbot during your study sessions.
legal.privacy_info_collect_auto_li1_desc: Pages visited, features used, time spent, and interactions with the Service.
legal.privacy_info_collect_auto_li2_desc: Browser type, operating system, and screen resolution.
legal.privacy_how_use_p1: We use the information we collect to:
legal.privacy_how_use_li2: Track your study progress and generate readiness scores
legal.privacy_how_use_li3: Power the AI Tutor with context about your learning gaps and progress
legal.privacy_how_use_li4: Personalise your study plan based on your test date
legal.privacy_how_use_li5: Improve the Service through aggregated, anonymised analytics
legal.privacy_ai_p1_suffix: to power the AI Tutor chatbot. When you interact with the AI Tutor:
legal.privacy_ai_li1: Your messages are sent to Google's Gemini API for processing.
legal.privacy_ai_li2_prefix: Google may process this data in accordance with their own privacy policies. We encourage you to review
legal.privacy_ai_li3: We do not use your chat data to train any AI models. Chat data is used solely to generate real-time responses.
legal.privacy_ai_li4: AI-generated responses are informational only and should not be considered official government advice.
legal.privacy_storage_p1_prefix: Your data is stored securely using
legal.privacy_storage_li1: Encryption at rest and in transit (TLS 1.2+)
legal.privacy_storage_li2: Row Level Security (RLS) policies on all database tables
legal.privacy_storage_li3: Regular security audits and compliance certifications
legal.privacy_storage_p2: While we implement commercially reasonable security measures, no method of electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security of your data.
legal.privacy_third_parties_p1: We use the following third-party services that may process your data:
legal.privacy_third_parties_li2_desc_prefix: Payment processing. When you purchase a Sprint Pass, your payment details are processed directly by Stripe. We do not store your card details. See
legal.privacy_breach_p1_prefix: In the event of a data breach that is likely to result in serious harm to affected individuals, we will notify the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC) and affected individuals as soon as practicable, in accordance with the
legal.privacy_rights_p1: Under the Australian Privacy Act, you have the right to:
legal.privacy_rights_li1_desc: your personal information held by us
legal.privacy_rights_li4_desc: for data processing at any time
legal.privacy_rights_li5_desc: with the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC) if you believe your privacy has been breached
legal.privacy_rights_p2_prefix: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
legal.privacy_cookies_p1_prefix: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience. For full details, please see our
legal.privacy_children_p1: The Service is not intended for children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us immediately.
legal.privacy_changes_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the “Last updated” date. Your continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
legal.privacy_contact_p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:
legal.cookies_what_p1: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the site owners.
legal.cookies_we_use_p1: CitizenMate uses the following types of cookies:
legal.cookies_essential_desc: These cookies are necessary for the Service to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually set in response to actions you take, such as logging in or setting your study preferences.
legal.cookies_functional_desc: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalisation, such as remembering your study preferences and test date.
legal.cookies_analytics_p1_suffix: to understand how visitors use our Service. These cookies collect information in an anonymised form, including the pages visited, time spent on pages, and how users arrived at our site.
legal.cookies_analytics_consent_note_suffix: via the cookie consent banner displayed on your first visit.
legal.cookies_managing_p1: You can manage your cookie preferences in several ways:
legal.cookies_managing_li1_desc: When you first visit CitizenMate, a consent banner will appear allowing you to accept or decline non-essential cookies.
legal.cookies_managing_li2_desc: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can delete existing cookies and set your browser to block future cookies.
legal.cookies_managing_p2: Please note that blocking essential cookies may prevent you from using certain features of the Service, such as logging in to your account.
legal.cookies_changes_p1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated “Last updated” date.
legal.cookies_contact_p1: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:

checkout.success_confirmation_email: A confirmation email will arrive shortly. If you need any help, reach out to

checkout.cancel_ready_hint: When you're ready to unlock all mock tests and unlimited AI tutoring, the Sprint Pass will be waiting for you.
checkout.cancel_no_recurring: One-time payment — no recurring charges or hidden fees
checkout.cancel_refund_policy: 7-day refund policy if you change your mind

errors.temp_hiccup: No worries, mate — this is a temporary hiccup. Your study progress is safe. Try refreshing the page, or head back to the dashboard.
errors.not_found_desc: Looks like this page has gone walkabout! Don't worry — your study progress is safe. Let's get you back on track.

landing.hero_title: Pass your Australian Citizenship Test — guaranteed.
landing.hero_desc: Your mate for the journey. Study in your language. Practice with real test format questions. Know when you're ready with AI-powered analytics.
landing.features_desc: More than a quiz app — CitizenMate is your personal study partner for the Australian citizenship test.
landing.features_smart_desc: 20 questions, 45 minutes — just like the real test. Detailed explanations referencing the official Our Common Bond booklet.
landing.features_bilingual_desc: Study official content in English alongside your native language. Understand concepts deeply, then answer confidently.
landing.features_ready_desc: Track progress topic by topic. See your strengths, identify gaps, and know exactly when you're ready to sit the test.
landing.hiw_desc: From first practice to test day — CitizenMate guides you the whole way.
landing.hiw_body: Start with a diagnostic, study at your own pace with bilingual support, then take full mock tests until you're confident. No fluff — just the three steps that work.
landing.hiw_step_1_desc: Start with 10 quick questions to discover where you stand.
landing.hiw_step_2_desc: Tailored study based on your gaps, in your language.
landing.hiw_step_3_desc: Full mock tests, progress tracking, and AI explanations.
landing.cta_title: Ready to become an Australian citizen, mate?
landing.cta_desc: Start your free practice test now — no signup needed. See where you stand in 10 minutes.
landing.cta_fineprint: No credit card required. Free tier available forever.
landing.pricing_title: Start free, upgrade when you're ready
landing.pricing_desc: Most users pass within 60 days. One payment, no subscriptions, no surprises.
landing.pricing_free_desc: Try CitizenMate and see where you stand.
landing.pricing_sprint_desc: Everything you need to pass — designed for your study window.
landing.pricing_trust: One-time payment · No recurring charges · 60 days of full access
landing.footer_desc: Your mate for the citizenship test. Study in your language, practice with AI, and pass with confidence.
landing.footer_disclaimer: CitizenMate is independent from the Australian Government. Not affiliated with or endorsed by the Department of Home Affairs.
landing.footer_content_note: Content based on "Our Common Bond" booklet — March 2026 edition.
